question_intent: Total points scored by drivers from British constructors in races held in Australia

plan.question_intent: Total points scored by drivers from British constructors in races held in Australia
plan.detail_query: SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name AS race_name, r.year, rs.points FROM results rs JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid WHERE co.nationality = 'British' AND c.country = 'Australia' GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name, r.year, rs.points

JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name, r.year, rs.points
blocks.notes: Points scored by British constructor drivers in Australian races

build_logs.notes: Points scored by British constructor drivers in Australian races

steps.clause: JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
WHERE (co.nationality = 'British')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
WHERE (co.nationality = 'British') AND (c.country = 'Australia')
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name AS race_name, r.year, rs.points
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
WHERE (co.nationality = 'British') AND (c.country = 'Australia')
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name, r.year, rs.points

build_logs.notes: Total points scored by British constructor drivers in Australian races

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name AS race_name, r.year, rs.points
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
WHERE (co.nationality = 'British') AND (c.country = 'Australia')
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name, r.year, rs.points) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.points) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name AS race_name, r.year, rs.points
FROM results rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races r ON rs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors co ON rs.constructorid = co.constructorid
WHERE (co.nationality = 'British') AND (c.country = 'Australia')
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name, r.year, rs.points) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.points) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT cr.raceid, r.year, r.round, r.name AS race_name, c.name AS constructor_name, cr.points
FROM constructorresults AS cr
JOIN races AS r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors AS cons ON cr.constructorid = cons.constructorid
WHERE (cons.nationality = 'British')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total number of points scored by British constructors in races held in Australia?
